title: [PrepareForEmission] Reuse existing wires for output ports even with multiuses
body:
This is similar change to f20d66557c8cbf6a69 based on 1bcd3f49c2a. 
If an output value of an instance is used multiple times but assigned to a single wire, 
we can use this wire instead of creating new one. `reuseExistingInOut` is changed to return single assignment.
